strengths: Extensive hands-on experience designing high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems and microservices, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators, and agentic workflows at re:cinq.
Strong commitment to engineering excellence and reliability, demonstrated through advocacy for TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development across multiple roles.
concerns: Lacks the required 5+ years of executive-level technical leadership and has no demonstrated experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Missing deep fintech domain expertise in algorithmic working-capital management, real-time credit risk, or complex trade decisioning.
AI experience appears very recent and foundational, lacking the required track record of operating complex multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes, regulated commercial environments.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with strong expertise in distributed systems, low-latency microservices, and modern engineering practices. However, he falls significantly short of the executive requirements for this CTO role. He lacks the mandated 5+ years of senior technical leadership scaling teams of 10-30+ engineers, and his recent foray into AI-agent infrastructure does not meet the hard requirement for deep, production-grade multi-agent AI experience in regulated fintech environments.
